div.div: 1. debt-check-request: account-service sends customerId to credit-service to check overdue debt before account creation

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1055px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 2. debt-check-response: credit-service responds with hasOverdueDebt boolean to account-service

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1080px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 3. credit-card-check-request: account-service sends VIP profile check to credit-service

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1105px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 4. credit-card-check-response: credit-service responds with hasActiveCreditCard (response producer exists, consumer pending)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1130px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 5. transaction-events: transaction-service publishes transaction data for AI fraud analysis by fraud-detection-service (Gemini)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1155px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 6. transaction-completed: transaction-service notifies credit-service when transaction completes (debit card balance update)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1180px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 7. yanki-transfer: yanki-service publishes wallet-to-wallet transfer events (send/receive by phone)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1205px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 8. credit-card / debit events: credit-service internal events for card operations

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 998px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1240px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Note: Topics run on Azure Event Hubs (Kafka protocol, SASL_SSL :9093). Inter-service communication is Kafka-only — no REST calls between microservices.

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
